title: iberis pinnata
intro: Iberis pinnata, also known as the Rock Cress or Alpine Cress, is a flowering plant species in the mustard family (Brassicaceae) that is native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. Its medicinal properties include relieving respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds, and soothing skin irritations and wounds. Herbal preparations of Iberis pinnata include teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to promote overall health and well-being, making it a valuable addition to herbal remedies.
